description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular layout. The property features a driveway leading to a covered carport, a manicured lawn, and a fenced backyard with a rectangular swimming pool. Large windows line the facade facing the pool, allowing for ample natural light and a seamless indoor-outdoor connection. Mature trees provide shade and privacy, while a paved walkway and patio area offer outdoor seating and relaxation space. The exterior is finished in neutral tones, with a combination of concrete, glass, and metal elements. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, a carport, and a backyard pool, surrounded by a manicured lawn and mature trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, carport, and main entrance, with a tree and lawn in the foreground.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the fenced backyard, swimming pool, and patio area, with the carport partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the pool, patio, and large windows facing the backyard, with both trees visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the carport, driveway, and side fencing, with the pool and patio partially visible.
